CANDIDATE: Shashwat Mahajan

Python, Java, JavaScript, LLMs, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AWS Bedrock, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, AgentCore Memory, Prompt Engineering, RAGAS, HuggingFace, Vector Embeddings, ChromaDB, FastAPI, Docker, GitHub Actions, AWS S3, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, REST APIs, WebSockets, AWS (Bedrock, AgentCore, S3), Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL, React.js, Node.js, XGBoost, SMOTE, Playwright, SendGrid, LinkedIn/Indeed/Naukri APIs, BeautifulSoup, Brevo SMTP

KEY PROJECTS:
- JobIntel Agent: A multi-agent job discovery system using CrewAI, Groq, and Ollama. It fetches jobs from 15 sources, scores jobs using intent matching, and sends automated reports. Stack: Python, CrewAI, Groq API, Ollama, BeautifulSoup, GitHub Actions. Multi-agent system; Intent matching; Automated reporting
- Financial Analyst RAG System: A production RAG pipeline for real-time multi-company financial analysis. It applies the RAGAS evaluation framework to benchmark retrieval faithfulness and answer relevance. Stack: Python, LangChain, ChromaDB, HuggingFace, RAGAS, AWS S3, GitHub Actions. Production RAG pipeline; RAGAS evaluation framework
- Credit Risk Assessment System: A full-stack ML system for credit risk assessment. It investigates severe class imbalance in a 10,000-record credit dataset using SMOTE oversampling and trains an XGBoost classifier. Stack: React.js, FastAPI, XGBoost, Docker, GitHub Actions, SMOTE. Full-stack ML system; SMOTE oversampling; XGBoost classifier
- AWS Bedrock AgentCore Agent: A stateful AI agent using AWS Bedrock AgentCore and LangGraph. It builds and deploys a stateful AI agent with persistent memory, session continuity, and context retrieval. Stack: Python, LangGraph, AWS Bedrock, AWS Bedrock AgentCore, AgentCore Memory, Docker, FastAPI, XGBoost, GitHub Actions, SMOTE. Stateful AI agent; Persistent memory; Session continuity

WORK EXPERIENCE:
- Generative AI Engineer Intern at Technical Hub (Jan 2026 – Present): Designed and shipped LangChain-based RAG pipelines serving live end users. Applied systematic prompt evaluation and failure analysis to reduce hallucination rates.
